title: 【Cobblemon】BadgeBox
description: A side mod for Cobblemon that adds the badgebox from the Pokemon Anime, also comes with custom badges
body:
![BadgeBox Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be07559c3cd4dcc0fd04d11ffe83062e011207e5.png)
~~------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~
### A simple mod for Cobblemon added for role play, adding 18 original badges (for each type).
### They are only obtainable in creative to really make them unique, can be given by admins to worthy Cobblemon Trainers

~~------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~
### Base Badge Box :
### 
![BadgeBox Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bedbc55f6e4938587fc3225dbb81335811635942.png)
### BadgeBox's simple recipe is beginner friendly, so you can start your your champion journey as soon as possible
![BadgeBox Opened](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/787eaccfa9a65946c85e5685bca51f07f9b832a7.png)

~~------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~
### "Upgraded" BadgeBox :
!["Upgraded" BadgeBox Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca59badb29ac7d36014328f1280564b35082298.png)

### This "upgrade" is destined to add a 9th slot
![BadgeBox Opened](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8663bc155e38b1a2927263daaf04b4e1cb3494e1.png)

### This 9th slot is designated for the Master Ribbon, proof that you are the strongest trainer among the strongests

~~------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~
## Compatibility
### If you want your mod to be compatible with this BadgeBox you should add the tags : 
```
badgebox:badges
```
### (for any badges or item supposed to go in any of the 8 slots)

```
badgebox:ribbons
```
### (for any reward supposed to go in the 9th slot)

## Compatible Mods 
[Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges)

[Additional items for Cobblemon](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-items-for-cobblemon)

~~------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~
